titleStmt.title: SII 11.182: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 182. (B.K. No. 78 of 1927-28.) DŌṆI, MUṆḌARGI PĒṬHĀ, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE WALL OF THE SIDDHALIṄGADĒVA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 23, Bahudhānya, Pushya, amāvāsye, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa, Vyatīpāta, corresponding probably to A.D. 1098, December 25, Saturday, which was the day of Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti; the week day cited in the record seems to be an error. The epigraph registers a grant of tax-free land made by the Mahājanas, who were headed by the Ūroḍeya, and the Seṭṭis of Drōṇāpura to the god Siddhēśvaradēva. Śaktiśiva-Paṇḍita, the āchārya of the temple, received the gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samasta bhuvanajanasaṁstoyamānānēkaguṇaratnaniratama
hanīyamahimāḷaṁkārarappa drōṇāpuradūroḍeyapramukha mahājana maṟuvadiṁba rsseṭṭōttamaru mirddu
śrīmaccāḷukyavikramakālada 23 neya bahudhānyasaṁvatsarada puṣyadamāvāsye Āditya vāre muttarāyaṇasaṁ
kramaṇa vyatīpātadaṁdu siddhēśvaradēvargge Alliyācāryyar śaktiśivapaṇḍitargge dhārā pūrbbakaṁ māḍi grāmada pū
rbbadiśābhāgada holade mēreyoḷe koṭṭa tōṁṭada nelaṁ mattarondu Adarkke mūḍalu holada mēreya niṟuvuṁgallē mēre . teṁkalu
haḷḷevē mēre . haḍuval mēre . baḍagalu mayyana toṁṭavē mēre . Adalladeyuṁ mattamāpuṇya
mūrttigaḷu Ūra teṁkavolada lūroḍeyara mānyada bhūmiya mūḍalu koṭṭa keymatta rāṟu . Antātōṇṭakkaṁ keyga ma
ḷivasatanyāyaṁ cakravarttiya sēse modalāgi sarbbabādhāparihāra © mattamūrirddu koṭṭa siddhēśvaradēvare kērige mū
ḍalu kōṭeyē mēre . teṁkalu karuvana satrada vaṭṭāravē mēre . haḍuvalu baṭṭeyē mēre . baḍagal dēgulavē mēre © Intī dha
rmmaṁgaḷaṁ tappade pratipāḷisidavarige vāraṇāsi prayāge Argghyatīrtthaṁ kurukṣētramemba puṇyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷ pannircchā
sira kavileyaṁ kōḍuṁkoḷagumaṁ ponna lkaṭṭisi tapōdhanarggaṁ caturvvēda pāragarappa brāhmaṇarggaṁ koṭṭa puṇya
rappar . Ī dharmmamaṁ puṇyatīrtthaṁga ḷoḷī lōkadoḷa guḷḷaṁtappa liṁgaṁga
tapōdhanaruṁ brāThe rest is built
Digital edition of SII 11.182 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
